name: TRENDnet TPE-BG182g, 18-Port Gigabit 440W 4PPoE Switch with 8 x 95W 4PPoE Ports, 8 x 30W PoE+ Ports, 2 xGigabit SFP Slots,440W PoE Budget, 1U 19” Rack Mountable,Lifetime Protection
